---
name: Feature request
about: A rule, format, or workflow regdrift should support
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem would this solve?**

Tell us about the workflow (CI gate, doc review, header generation, ...) —
not just the feature.

**Proposed behavior**

**Would a new RULES.md rule be involved?**

If yes: what severity (BREAKING/WARNING/SAFE) and why?
